content.en:
"Lord of the Bloody Night!"

The Lord of the Heavenly Vessel sensed that Ye Tian came out of Zhonghai Yuan, thinking that Ye Tian was the Lord of the Blood Night, and shuttled over directly.

And Ye Tian naturally sensed the Lord of Heavenly Vessels, and directly shuttled away from here.

The strength of the Lord of Heavenly Vessels was stronger than Ye Tian, but Ye Tian's speed was not bad.

Thereupon.

They ran and chased.

However, after Ye Tian fled into the Boundless Giant River in the central region, the Lord of the Heavenly Vessel still gave up tracking.

The Boundless Giant River is a river that runs through the entire central part of the country, and even if it is the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, it is not very convenient to trace it in the Boundless Giant River.

Because the will of the Origin Realm couldn't probe far in the Boundless Giant River, Ye Tian was the first to enter the Boundless Giant River, and when he chased after him, he couldn't lock Ye Tian's location, and there was no point in tracking.

Besides, he didn't think he could kill the Lord of the Blood Night.

After going back.

He reported the matter to Chaotian Sacred Mountain, and said that the Lord of the Bloody Night had broken into Zhonghaiyuan to find Haiyuan Sand.

In Ye Tian's opinion, the Lord of the Blood Night only went to Zhonghaiyuan to find the abyss, and there was no other purpose.

......

Chaotian Holy Mountain.

After several top-notch Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors learned of this, they immediately became a little angry.

Although Zhonghaiyuan is said to be in the territory of Tianhai Mountain, it actually belongs to Chaotian Holy Mountain, and the Lord of the Bloody Night dares to break into Zhonghaiyuan in private, this is to provoke them Chaotian Holy Mountain!

This matter can't just be left at that, otherwise everyone will want to dive into the middle of the sea abyss.

"The Lord of the Blood Night shouldn't have discovered the King of the Abyssal Beasts, right?" said the Lord of the Top-Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor Yanwu.

"I definitely didn't find it!" Another top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor Ruins Lord said with a smile: "The Lord of the Blood Night is just a top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor who has just broken through, even we can't beat him, how dare he break into the depths of the Middle Sea Abyss, there is a group of Sea Abyss Beasts comparable to us in the depths of the Middle Sea Abyss, even we can't get close to the King of the Sea Abyss Beasts, and the Lord of the Blood Night definitely doesn't know." "

"The Mountain Lord said that the King of the Sea Abyss Beast can't let the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the outside world know, and he can't disturb it, otherwise there will be big trouble. "The Lord of the Flames.

"Then let's go and knock on the Lord of the Bloody Night, and let the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors know that Zhonghai Yuan is not something they can break into. "The main road of the ruins.

"Good!"

The Lord of the Flame also nodded.

Immediately afterwards, the Lord of Yanwu and the Lord of the Ruins, they led a group of Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors to the Blood Night Palace of the Xiao family in the central part of the country, and the Lord of the Blood Night practiced in retreat here.

Of course.

If the Lord of the Blood Night can't find it, they will have to trouble the Xiao family.

After some time, they came to the Blood Night Palace.

The servants of the Blood Night Palace trembled with fear when they saw so many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors descending.

And the Lord of the Blood Night was also the first to know about it, and came out of the palace.

"Lord of the Flames, Lord of the Ruins......"

The Lord of the Bloody Night saw that the overlord-level forces had come to the Heavenly Holy Mountain with so many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, as well as several top-notch Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and he was a little puzzled for a while.

"A few of you have come to my Blood Night Palace as guests, at least talk about it in advance!"

The Lord of the Blood Night smirked.

The Lord of Yanwu said coldly: "Lord of the Bloody Night, don't pretend to be confused, you trespass into the Zhonghai Abyss, do you want to provoke us to the Heavenly Holy Mountain?"

"What, trespassing on the ???? of Zhonghai Abyss"

The Lord of the Blood Night looked confused, all these years, he has been practicing in retreat and has not gone out!

"Everyone, is there a misunderstanding, I have been cultivating in the Blood Night Palace!" said the Lord of the Blood Night.

"Hehe, you were discovered by the Lord of the Heavenly Vessel of Tianhai Mountain, he chased and killed you, and as a result, you fled into the Boundless River, which is why you escaped!" said the Lord of Yanwu again.

Hearing this, the Lord of the Blood Night was helpless.

If he did, he would admit it, but the point is that he didn't do it!

"Everyone, you can spy on the time and space of my Blood Night Palace, I have indeed been cultivating here and have not left. The Lord of the Bloody Night said.

Although doing so would expose all the secrets of his Blood Night Palace, he didn't want to offend Chaotian Holy Mountain, so he could only choose to do so.

however

The Lord of Yanwu said: "Spy on time and space, at the level of you and me, it is easy to modify time and space with a little time, maybe you have already modified time and space, what is the point of us snooping on time and space!"

"Lord of Yanwu, if I didn't do it, I didn't do it, why should you wronged me!"

The Lord of the Bloody Night was also annoyed.

If it was other weaker Origin Ascending Realm, he would have taken action directly.

It was also the fact that the Lord of Yanwu was stronger than him, and he was the Origin Heavenly Ancestor of the Heavenly Sacred Mountain, so he didn't dare to make a move, so he could only swallow his breath, but it didn't mean that he didn't have anger.

"Wronged you, are you qualified?"

The Lord of the Flame sneered.

A mere Lord of the Bloody Night, with no big background, is also worthy of letting them be wronged by the Heavenly Holy Mountain?

Rumble!!!!

The Lord of Yanwu made a move, directly suppressing the Lord of the Blood Night.

The Lord of the Bloody Night naturally didn't want to be captured, so he resisted.

Bang!!!!!

Fighting broke out on both sides.

The aftermath instantly turned the servants of the Lord of the Blood Night into ashes, and the battle even destroyed the Palace of the Blood Night.

Soon.

The Lord of the Blood Night was injured, how could he have dealt with several top-notch Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors who were stronger than him with his own strength!

Moreover, these Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, all of them possessed the Origin Origin Treasure, completely crushing him.

Burst!!!!

The Lord of the Bloody Night was beaten to the point that his whole body was constantly cracking, and he kept vomiting blood, and he was extremely embarrassed.

"Lord of Yanwu, I really didn't do it, it may be that the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm disguised himself as me and deliberately framed me!"

However, the Lord of the Flame still didn't believe it.

"Lord of Yanwu, at our level, if you want to disguise yourself as another Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, where is it so easy? The Lord of the Heavenly Vessel sees you, the origin is the same, and there is a fake? If even the origin can be disguised, the entire central part will already be chaotic!"

The Lord of the Flame said coldly.

It didn't take long.

The Lord of the Bloody Night was beaten to the point that his breath was extremely weak, and he was about to fall.

However, the Lord of Yanwu still didn't make a dead move, and after seeing that the Lord of the Bloody Night had been severely injured, they still stopped.

Although the Lord of the Blood Night has no background, he also has some friends, if only the Lord of the Blood Night breaks into the Zhonghai Abyss, they will kill the Lord of the Blood Night, and they will also have a bad reputation for the Chaotian Holy Mountain.

So, just teach the Lord of the Blood Night a lesson, there's no need to kill him.

"Lord of the Bloody Night, this time I will teach you a lesson, if you break into Zhonghai Abyss next time, it will kill you!"

After they finished speaking, the Lord of the Flame left the place.
